query: Plot on the map the BigEarthNet, xView1 images in Germany from 2nd half of 2017

task0.objective: Fetch images from the BigEarthNet dataset specifically from Germany in the 2nd half of 2017.

task1.objective: Fetch images from the xView1 dataset specifically from Germany in the 2nd half of 2017.

task2.objective: Plot the fetched BigEarthNet and xView1 images on the map of Germany.
